original_image_tags: Faded red stamp at bottom center reads "DEC 30 1949 3:22 PM" and below it "FBI RECEIVED-TVD"

elements.description: Typed document page with a faint, upside-down blue stamp at the bottom reading 'FBI RECEIVED - TVD' followed by an illegible date.

judge.reason: One description reads the stamp text as 'DEC 30 1949 3:22 PM FBI RECEIVED-TVD' while the other quotes it as 'FBI RECEIVED - TVD' with an illegible date, contradicting on the specific quoted text of the stamp.
